task: codex §9 BLOCK fix-1 on the gpu-rerank merge (embed_batch_cls singleton + .pyi stub)

commits.summary: fix(fathomdb-py): CLS embedder singleton retries + surfaces real load error; add embed_batch_cls .pyi stub

finding_1.detail: CLS helpers (cls_embedder_singleton, embed_batch_cls_impl) ARE already #[cfg(feature="default-embedder")]-gated; the no-default-features path uses the separate #[cfg(not(feature="default-embedder"))] stub. `cargo check -p fathomdb-py --no-default-features` exits 0, confirming the opt-in path builds without the CLS/embedder code.

finding_2.detail: cls_embedder_singleton cached Option<CandleBgeEmbedder> in a OnceLock via .ok(), so a transient load failure was memoized as None forever and embed_batch_cls_impl flattened every failure to 'cache miss + no network'. Extracted a feature-agnostic get_or_try_init<T,E>(cell, init) helper that memoizes ONLY on success: a failed init returns the real EmbedderLoadError and leaves the OnceLock empty so the next call retries. cls_embedder_singleton now returns Result<&'static CandleBgeEmbedder, EmbedderLoadError>; embed_batch_cls_impl surfaces that real error via format!("default embedder weights unavailable: {e}"). Panic boundary (catch_unwind) and the successful CLS path are byte-identical.
finding_2.test: get_or_try_init_caches_only_on_success (unit test, runs under default `cargo test -p fathomdb-py --lib`) proves a failed init is not cached, a subsequent success is memoized, and the init closure is not re-run after caching.

finding_3.detail: Added the missing embed_batch_cls declaration to src/python/fathomdb/_fathomdb.pyi (placed between rerank(...) and force_panic_for_test()): `def embed_batch_cls(texts: list[str]) -> list[list[float]]` with a docstring noting the CLS-pooled batch-embed path, empty-list -> [] behavior, FATHOMDB_EMBED_DEVICE honoring, and the default-embedder/embed-cuda feature requirement (raises EmbedderNotConfiguredError otherwise). Signature verified against fathomdb-py/src/lib.rs #[pyfunction] fn embed_batch_cls(py, texts: Vec<String>) -> PyResult<Vec<Vec<f32>>>.

supplemental_verification.note: fathomdb-py `default` features are empty, so the workspace gates do NOT compile the default-embedder-gated CLS code. Ran extra feature-on checks to confirm the fix path compiles cleanly and the test passes.

notes: The prompt file dev/plans/prompts/0.8.14-slice-25-fix-1.md was NOT present in the worktree; proceeded from the mandate text, which contained the full spec. cargo fmt pre-commit hook reformatted the cls_embedder_singleton return-type signature on first commit attempt; re-committed after `cargo fmt -p fathomdb-py`. Ready for codex re-review + cherry-pick by the orchestrator.
